revision.comment: Changed protection level for "[[Template:Xt]]": used in system messages ([[MediaWiki:Titleblacklist-custom-archive]]) ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require administrator access] (indefinite))

Dark mode compatibility per edit request
Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.

revision.comment: Changed protection settings for "[[Template:Xt]]": Reduce move protection to TE per RfPP request: [[Special:Diff/1318706023]] ([Edit=Require template editor access] (indefinite) [Move=Require template editor access] (indefinite))

1 revision imported: importing this file, and also doing a full refresh import of all dependencies, because I am concerned this is one with a lot of broken dependencies. Intended end result is the template [[Template:Talk page header]] which is gonna be highly customized to our usage later on
